(NMG) is a yearly American conference/festival hybrid devoted to the performance, development, and promotion of new and [contemporary classical music](/wiki/Contemporary_classical_music "Contemporary classical music").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

American yearly contemporary music conference/festival

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c8/Double_bass_and_modular_synthesizer_played_by_Gahlord_Dewald_at_New_Music_Gathering%2C_2017.jpg/250px-Double_bass_and_modular_synthesizer_played_by_Gahlord_Dewald_at_New_Music_Gathering%2C_2017.jpg)](/wiki/File:Double_bass_and_modular_synthesizer_played_by_Gahlord_Dewald_at_New_Music_Gathering,_2017.jpg)

Experimental [double-bassist](/wiki/Double-bassist "Double-bassist") [Gahlord Dewald](/wiki/Gahlord_Dewald "Gahlord Dewald") performing with [modular synthesizer](/wiki/Modular_synthesizer "Modular synthesizer"), NMG 2017

**New Music Gathering** (NMG) is a yearly American conference/festival hybrid devoted to the performance, development, and promotion of new and [contemporary classical music](/wiki/Contemporary_classical_music "Contemporary classical music").

The festival, established in 2015 and conducted in a different city each year, includes performances, lectures/recitals, discussion groups, presentations, and coordinated social interaction, including artist meet-ups and live-action role-playing games.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)[[5]](#cite_note-5)

## Festivals

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=New_Music_Gathering&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Festivals")]

| Year | Location | Keynote speaker | Headline performers | Theme[[6]](#cite_note-6)[[7]](#cite_note-7) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 2015 | [San Francisco Conservatory of Music](/wiki/San_Francisco_Conservatory_of_Music "San Francisco Conservatory of Music") | [Claire Chase](/wiki/Claire_Chase "Claire Chase") | Claire Chase, [Kronos Quartet](/wiki/Kronos_Quartet "Kronos Quartet"), [Wu Man](/wiki/Wu_Man "Wu Man"), [Sarah Cahill](/wiki/Sarah_Cahill_(pianist) "Sarah Cahill (pianist)"), The Living Earth Show | "Artist Led Ensembles" |
| 2016 | [Peabody Institute](/wiki/Peabody_Institute "Peabody Institute") of [Johns Hopkins University](/wiki/Johns_Hopkins_University "Johns Hopkins University") | [Marin Alsop](/wiki/Marin_Alsop "Marin Alsop") | [Sō Percussion](/wiki/S%C5%8D_Percussion "Sō Percussion"), [Kathleen Supové](/wiki/Kathleen_Supov%C3%A9 "Kathleen Supové"), Lunar Ensemble, Sonar New Music Ensemble | "Communities" |
| 2017 | [Bowling Green State University](/wiki/Bowling_Green_State_University "Bowling Green State University") | [Steven Schick](/wiki/Steven_Schick "Steven Schick") | Steven Schick, [International Contemporary Ensemble](/wiki/International_Contemporary_Ensemble "International Contemporary Ensemble"), [Grand Valley State University](/wiki/Grand_Valley_State_University "Grand Valley State University") New Music Ensemble | "Support" |
| 2018 | [Boston Conservatory at Berklee](/wiki/Boston_Conservatory_at_Berklee "Boston Conservatory at Berklee") | [Helga Davis](/wiki/Helga_Davis "Helga Davis") | [JACK Quartet](/wiki/JACK_Quartet "JACK Quartet"), [Pamela Z](/wiki/Pamela_Z "Pamela Z"), [Dinosaur Annex Music Ensemble](/wiki/Dinosaur_Annex_Music_Ensemble "Dinosaur Annex Music Ensemble") | "Accessibility" |
| 2020 | [Portland State University](/wiki/Portland_State_University "Portland State University"), Third Angle New Music, Fear No Music (fully online event)[[8]](#cite_note-8)[[9]](#cite_note-9) | [Nathalie Joachim](/wiki/Nathalie_Joachim "Nathalie Joachim") | Seth Parker Woods, [Third Coast Percussion](/wiki/Third_Coast_Percussion "Third Coast Percussion"), Flutronix | "Local Action" |
| 2021 | [Landmark Center (St. Paul)](/wiki/Landmark_Center_(St._Paul) "Landmark Center (St. Paul)") | Garrett McQueen | Queen Drea |  |
